parsed_profile.data_integrity_note: Distillation package contains exclusively LLM unavailable fallback stubs across all volumes. No authored chapter content, story-design mechanics, character dynamics, or reader-facing craft observations exist in source data. Volume-level and book-level pattern analysis cannot be performed.
parsed_profile.recommended_action: Source chapters must be processed through standard LLM extraction pipeline with non-fallback chapter_card generation before book_design_card distillation can yield meaningful story-design mechanics, genre grammar, or reader promise.
